markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review January performance, editorial cadence, and introduce the new Check That tool.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Editorial Cadence Improving:** Publishing is on track (14 articles live), but a backlog is forming due to pending Product Marketing (PMM) reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [**New MDR Content Strategy:** A 20-topic hub-and-spoke cluster is proposed to cover a major content gap and support the AdLumen initiative.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Strong Performance Signals:** Sessions are up 3x (to \~200/wk), and a new article ("Automated Patch Management") already ranks in Google's AI Overview, signaling high content value.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [**Check That Tool Introduced:** GrowthX's new LLM visibility tool was demoed; N-able will receive direct access for collaborative prompt management.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)

## Topics

### Editorial Cadence & Backlog

  - [**Status:** 14 articles published, 2 staged, 1 ready to stage.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [**Blocker:** A growing backlog awaits PMM review.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**"Building Attack Resilience":** Requires review from all Business Model Managers (BMMs) due to its end-to-end messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [**"Attack Resilience" Cluster:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
      - [3 more articles in production → 2 remaining to complete the cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
      - [Post-completion, focus will return to the original topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)

### Content Strategy & Revisions

  - [**New MDR Cluster:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A significant content gap exists for MDR topics, which are key to the AdLumen initiative.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [**Proposal:** A 20-topic hub-and-spoke cluster in Airtable ("Blog Ideas for Review" → "Detect and Respond").](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [**Action:** Elaine will review and seek feedback from Jen Thompson (PMM).](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [**"MDR by Vertical" Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
      - [**Status:** On hold.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
      - [**Challenge:** The term "MDR" has different meanings in verticals (e.g., "Medical Device" in healthcare), complicating keyword research.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
      - [**Decision:** Prioritize the general MDR cluster first.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [**"Cyber Resilience Primer" Article:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Publication is on hold due to a low-quality, pixelated hero image.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [**"Endpoint Automation Solutions" Article:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Requires a full rewrite based on feedback from Joe (UEM).](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
      - [**Issues:** Fragmented content (mixes "what is UEM/RMM" with solutions) and a navigational/commercial keyword intent.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
      - [**Action:** Elaine to provide a summary of feedback for the GrowthX editor.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)

### Performance & Wins

  - [**Session Growth:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
      - [Consistent growth from \~80 sessions/wk (Dec) to \~200 sessions/wk (Jan).](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
      - [Engaged sessions also rising, signaling high user value.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
  - [**Google AI Overview Win:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
      - [The "Automated Patch Management" article appeared in Google's AI Overview just 6 days after publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
      - [**Significance:** This signals high content value and allows N-able to rank for a keyword with mixed informational/commercial intent, where its product page was not ranking.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)

### New Tool: Check That

  - [**Purpose:** GrowthX's new proprietary tool for tracking LLM (e.g., ChatGPT) visibility, replacing Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [**N-able Access:** Direct product access is planned for collaborative prompt management.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)
      - [**Company Profile:** Consolidates N-able's market position, value prop, and personas.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)
      - [**Competitive Tracking:** Monitors N-able's LLM visibility, sentiment, and citations against a customizable competitor list.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
      - [**Prompt Management:** Tracks a living database of prompts, including common category-wide prompts for competitive insight.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)
  - [**Pending Questions:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
      - [**Search Volume:** Can Check That show search volume for tracked queries? (Matt to confirm).](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
      - [**Persona Rollups:** Can performance be filtered by persona (e.g., MDR, Kof)? (Feature is in development).](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1752.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
      - [File a design ticket for static CTA banners.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
      - [Confirm if Check That can display search volume data.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
      - [Schedule a follow-up call with Andrew to demo Check That.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
  - [**Elaine:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
      - [Provide a summary of feedback for the "Endpoint Automation Solutions" rewrite.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
      - [Email Matt the gated resource links and banner size requirements.](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
      - [Review the new MDR cluster topics in Airtable and get feedback from Jen Thompson (PMM).](https://fathom.video/share/Ex9pm1GCGpofj5-Ezczszt5-tNn19bqx?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
